title: Get Body Time Series by Date Range
description: Retrieves a list of all user's bmi, body fat, or weight for a given date range.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The body resource to be returned. Supported : bmi | fat | weight

parameters.name: begin-date
parameters.description: The start date specified in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today .

parameters.name: end-date
parameters.description: The end date specified in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today . Maximum range: 1095 days

response_fields.name: body-<resource> : datetime
response_fields.description: The datetime which the resource was recorded.
